---
title: "In silico detection of an antimicrobial peptide transferred horizontally from arthropods to bacteria" 
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the 2nd RSG-Colombia Symposium of young researchers in Bioinformatics at Ibagué, Colombia.
date: "2019-11-05"
image: RSG_Colombia_SC_2019.jpeg
categories:
- Oral presentation 
- Microbiology
- Bioinformatics
---
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill >}} Slides (Spanish)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/354369575_Deteccion_in_silico_de_un_peptido_antimicrobiano_AMP_transferido_horizontalmente_de_artropodos_a_bacterias){.btn target=_blank}

You can find more details about this project [here][amp-hgt]. 

[amp-hgt]: ../../projects/Horizontal_gene_transfer/
